e1.assumptions: Phase 1 and Phase 2 combined rough count. Spike required before Phase 2 stories can be scoped — story count may reduce if spike produces REDESIGN. Gauge captured at month start (Pro+ counter reset May 1).

spike.question: Can the GitHub Copilot CLI or Copilot API be invoked non-interactively server-side with an assembled SKILL.md prompt and return structured, parseable output — enabling Phase 2 skill execution from a web backend?
spike.unblockedStage: definition (Phase 2 skill execution epic + M1 metric)

Copilot CLI programmatic invocation confirmed viable via 6-step thorough investigation of GitHub official docs. All 4 done conditions met: (a) -p flag non-interactive, (b) COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN headless auth, (c) ACP server multi-turn, (d) BYOK + COPILOT_OFFLINE self-hosting. Spike artefacts committed. Decisions.md ADR-001 written. pipeline-state.json spike entry added (schema valid, 0 errors).
